description: This file defines a WebSocket connection manager class for handling active websocket connections and broadcasting messages within a FastAPI application. It includes connection setup and teardown, as well as broadcasting messages to all active connections.

classes.name: ConnectionManager
classes.description: A class that manages active WebSocket connections, allowing for connections to be added, removed, and messages broadcasted to all connections.

methods.name: None __init__(self)
methods.description: Initializes the ConnectionManager with an empty set of connections and an asyncio lock.

methods.name: None connect(self, websocket: WebSocket)
methods.description: Accepts a WebSocket connection and adds it to the set of active connections.

methods.name: None disconnect(self, websocket: WebSocket)
methods.description: Removes a WebSocket connection from the set of active connections.

methods.name: None broadcast_json(self, message: Dict[str, Any])
methods.description: Sends a JSON message to all active WebSocket connections in a thread-safe manner.

ctags.name: broadcast_json
ctags.pattern: /^    async def broadcast_json(self, message: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:$/

ctags.name: connect
ctags.pattern: /^    async def connect(self, websocket: WebSocket) -> None:$/

ctags.name: disconnect
ctags.pattern: /^    async def disconnect(self, websocket: WebSocket) -> None:$/
